title: このくらい平気なんだから！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking by the training track...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet suddenly stops in the middle of the
track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I wonder if she injured herself somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, it's nothing. I just popped a blister,
that's all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Do you happen to have any bandages on you?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to run some more, so I just need to patch
this up real quick.
choice_data_list: Want me to do it for you?
You should go to the infirmary, just in case!
You should go to the infirmary, just in case!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to run some more, so I just need to patch
this up real quick.
choice_data_list: Want me to do it for you?
You should go to the infirmary, just in case!
You should go to the infirmary, just in case!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, what a nice offer. How considerate of you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll take you up on that. Make sure to get the tape
on nice and tight!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hm, not bad. I think I can run on this. Thanks. It
still hurts a little, but I guess nothing can be done
about that.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Look, I said that I'm fine. Honestly, you're making
a big deal out of nothing.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But... I suppose I'd be able to run with more peace
of mind if I get it treated properly now...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Fine. I'll have the nurse look at it.
